# Add the v13.1 release section to ROADMAP.md

## Context

v13 shipped (2026-06-12); `ROADMAP.md` documents the harness arc as "Current Focus" but has **no v13.1 release section** — it stops at the harness narrative with no release boundary telling the swarm which epics are *now* vs deferred. Operator-flagged this session (@tobiu: *"we still have no v13.1 roadmap"*). The team converged the v13.1 scope this session (@neo-opus-vega's authoritative map + @neo-opus-ada's `[v13.1 SCOPE]` broadcast); this ticket captures it in `ROADMAP.md` per `#13380`'s "cornerstones + rationale, not exhaustive" shape.

## The Problem

Post-v13, roadmap-planning lapsed: ~30 open epics span harness + Brain + Body with no release boundary, producing the "abstract goals to chase" friction. A release should *trigger* the next roadmap (the intent behind `#13380`'s `update-roadmap` skill); until that skill exists, the v13.1 slice is hand-authored. The roadmap names the **load-bearing cornerstones + the why** + a visible **deferred "out"** so nothing is chased abstractly.

## The Architectural Reality

`ROADMAP.md` (repo root) is a strategic narrative doc, already harness-arc-aligned (anchored to ADR 0020). The v13.1 slice is an **additive section** (`## Next: v13.1`) after `## Current Focus: The Agent Harness` — NOT a rewrite. Coherent with `#13380` (the `update-roadmap` skill that will automate future roadmaps; this is the first hand-authored instance) and `ai/scripts/runners/roadmapPlanner.mjs`.

## The Fix

Add a `## Next: v13.1 — Harness Phase-1 + Reliability` section:
- **Thesis:** "v13 proved the institution; v13.1 gives it an operable face" — whole-organism, broad-foundation (foundation-slice now; full resolution may span v13.2).
- **Cornerstones (in):** harness spine (#13012 · #13015 · #13349 · #13376 · #13158-via-#13370 · #13056 · #13377) + 4 reliability (#13390 local-model-RAM [#12740 overtaken] · #12065 golden-path · #13287 codex-wake · #10291 cloud-stability).
- **3 graduations in:** #13370 · #13378 · #13374.
- **Discipline:** #13380 (roadmap skill) · epic-ownership (Discussion #13388) · agent-harness.md refresh.
- **Deferred → v13.2:** #12986 · #12679 · #12456 · #11404 · #10757 · #9950 · #9904 (dep-check clear — all `blocking:[]`).
- **Budget:** 100–150 merged PRs as a **ceiling, not a fill-target**.

Cornerstones + rationale only, NOT exhaustive (full set = milestone #8's linked items).

## Decision Record impact

`aligned-with ADR 0020` (the harness concept anchor). No amendment/supersession.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `ROADMAP.md` gains a `## Next: v13.1` section after `## Current Focus: The Agent Harness`.
- [ ] Section states thesis + cornerstones + rationale + the deferred "out" + budget-as-ceiling.
- [ ] NOT an exhaustive ticket list (coherent with `#13380`'s shape).
- [ ] References milestone #8; notes #12740 overtaken by #13390.
- [ ] @neo-opus-vega sign-off (she owns `ROADMAP.md` merge/lock).

## Out of Scope

- Populating milestone #8 (the post-STEP_BACK/sign-off step — not this ticket).
- Building the `#13380` `update-roadmap` skill.
- The cornerstone epics' own implementation.

## Related

`#13380` (roadmap skill) · Discussion `#13388` (epic-ownership) · milestone #8 · ADR 0020 · cornerstones #13012/#13015/#13349/#13376/#13158/#13056/#13377/#13390/#12065/#13287/#10291 · graduations #13370/#13378/#13374.

Release classification: post-v13 roadmap-planning (NOT v13-release-blocking) → boardless.
